subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to retrieve Datadog usage metrics including actual consumption (hosts, containers, events, custom metrics, logs), license allocations, and usage over time (e.g., last 6 months) to establish growth patterns
Query MongoDB to retrieve current Datadog contract configuration, license terms, allocated quantities per product tier, and pricing structure

Reconcile allocated licenses from MongoDB contract state with actual usage metrics from SQL warehouse. Compare allocation-to-usage ratios, identify underutilized or over-provisioned resources, calculate growth rates, and provide trend analysis with recommendations on license optimization and future capacity planning

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to aggregate historical usage metrics across multiple dimensions (hosts, containers, logs, custom metrics) with time-series grouping—moderate complexity but single source; (2) mongo_query (small tier) for straightforward contract/allocation retrieval; (3) cross_recon (frontier tier) to synthesize both sources, detect allocation-to-usage gaps, classify utilization patterns, compute growth metrics, and generate optimization recommendations. This is a two-source reconciliation task with inference-heavy analysis (gap detection, classification, trend forecasting), warranting frontier capability. No separate policy_action needed—recommendations are part of the reconciliation analysis, not governance policy evaluation.

output.sql: SELECT cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_date, cf.product, cf.event_type, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_amount_usd, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS total_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS distinct_users, COUNT(cf.event_id) AS event_count, SUM(SUM(cf.amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.product ORDER BY cf.event_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_amount_usd, LAG(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)) AS prev_month_amount_usd, SUM(cf.amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)) AS month_over_month_change, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(cf.amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date))) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)), 0), 2) AS mom_growth_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%datadog%' AND cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_date, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.product, cf.event_type, cf.event_date
